DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66147176)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-08-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CARLO BOLANOS' MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL ON THE GROUND OF MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE AND/OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DENY WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVANT SEEKS TO VACATE A DISMISSAL AND JUDGMENT BASED ON DISCOVERY SANCTIONS. BUT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FILED THE DISMISSAL IN THIS CASE ON NOVEMBER 30, 2020. THIS MOTION APPLIES TO CGC-22-597702 CARLO FLORES BOLANOS VS. JOSE BICHAO CANTE, BUT WAS MISFILED IN THIS CASE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal On The Ground Of Mistake, Inadvertence, Surprise And/Or Excusable Neglect
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CARLO BOLANOS' Motion To Vacate Dismissal On The Ground Of Mistake, Inadvertence, Surprise And/Or Excusable Neglect.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Deny without prejudice. Movant seeks to vacate a dismissal and judgment based on discovery sanctions. But plaintiff's counsel filed the dismissal in this case on November 30, 2020. This motion applies to CGC-22-597702 CARLO FLORES BOLANOS VS. JOSE BICHAO CANTE, but was misfiled in this case.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
